outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected: Aggregate GEX is deeply negative (-4.93B), indicating dealers are short gamma and will amplify price movements.
outlook.summary: Market is in a short-gamma trap. Dealers will sell into weakness, accelerating downward moves. Watch 657 Max Pain for pinning, but downside risk to 640 Resonance support is elevated.
